title: Akai Busshitsu [ Katana ]
body:
### This texture pack requires CIT Resewn

Originally this is a pack for _DoesntMatt3r_, however anyone else can use it.
This pack only contains a katana you get after renaming any sword/axe to **_Akai Busshitsu_**

![katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac00f0746363a93564b6d669a93f2b69ff4611e3.png)
